author: lOrm
content: Plan: add tests in two locations matching the #540 pattern. (1) In-file unit tests appended to src/web.rs#[cfg(test)] mod — covering spec behaviors 1–4 (validate_url SSRF guard, scheme allowlist, hostname denylist, output format). (2) tests/web_fetch_integration.rs (new) — wiremock-backed fetch_url tests covering behaviors 1 (HTTP 200 success path), 5 (HTTP non-200 error path), and the #610 DDG SSRF gap pin. No production code changes. Browser tests gated behind #[ignore] with OPENCLAUDIA_TEST_BROWSER=1 env comment. wiremock already in dev-deps.
